page: Microsoft Azure E32ds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Edsv6 server family. It is powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8573C processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The configuration provides 32 virtual CPUs derived from 16 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. It features 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. Storage capabilities include a bundled 1890 GB local disk with Premium Storage support, while no graphics processing units are present.

In benchmark evaluations, the E32ds_v6 demonstrates strong performance across memory operations and data processing. Large-block uncached memory bandwidth reaches 208.86 GB/sec for read-only operations and 90.98 GB/sec for write operations, both placing in the top 25% of tested systems. Single-threaded gzip compression and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression also register in the top 25%, achieving 31.38 GB/sec and 199.59 GB/sec respectively. Geekbench scores reflect this capability, with a single-core score of 2120.0 and a multi-core score of 17689.0. Additionally, the processor's Advanced Matrix Extensions support contributes to a top-tier text generation speed of 373.84 tokens/sec during small-model LLM inference.

The high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation of the E32ds_v6 offer qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring substantial RAM without the overhead of a GPU. The inclusion of a large 1890 GB local disk reduces the immediate need for external storage attachments for temporary data. This hardware profile is well-suited for memory-intensive applications, relational database management systems, large-scale caching layers, and data analytics pipelines.
description: The Microsoft Azure E32ds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Edsv6 family, running on a dedicated 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 32 vCPUs and 16 physical cores. It features 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high 8.0 GB per vCPU ratio, alongside a bundled 1890 GB local storage disk. In benchmark testing, the server exhibits strong performance, notably in large-block uncached memory read bandwidth at 208.86 GB/sec and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression at 199.59 GB/sec. It also achieves top-tier text generation speeds of 373.84 tokens/sec for small-model LLM inference, aided by Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions. Lacking a GPU, this server delivers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-heavy, non-graphical workloads. It is highly suited for relational databases, enterprise applications, in-memory caching, and data analytics.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E32ds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and a 1890 GB local disk, delivering strong memory bandwidth and high-speed data decompression for enterprise databases.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E32ds_v6 is a memory-optimized server with 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, built for database and data-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring high-speed Intel Xeon processing, dense RAM, and fast local storage for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 8573C processor
256 GB of system memory providing a high 8 GB per vCPU ratio
Bundled 1890 GB local storage disk with Premium Storage capability
Strong memory bandwidth reaching 208.86 GB/sec for uncached reads
Optimized for relational databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics
